headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Research Further and 2 We Ignore
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

raw.headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Research Further and 2 We Ignore

headline: Northrop Grumman (NOC) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Northrop Grumman (NOC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +12.28% and +0.73%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: How Investors May Respond To Textron (TXT) Expanding Its Role In Global Pilot Training Fleets
summary: Pipistrel, a Textron company, has secured Epic Flight Academy as the launch customer for its Voyager next-generation training aircraft, while Bell Textron has marked delivery of its 700th Bell 505 helicopter across more than 55 countries, reinforcing Textron’s presence in pilot training and light helicopter markets. The Voyager’s MOSAIC-aligned design and Epic’s purchase agreement for up to 50 aircraft, alongside the Bell 505’s broad adoption in military pilot training, underscore Textron’s...

headline: Textron (TXT) On New Aircraft Orders And Bell Demand As Undervalued View Holds
summary: Textron (TXT) is back in focus after Pipistrel named Epic Flight Academy the launch customer for the new Voyager trainer and Bell celebrated delivery of its 700th Bell 505 helicopter, highlighting the company’s broad aviation footprint. See our latest analysis for Textron. Against this aviation news backdrop, Textron’s share price sits at US$90.79, with a 7-day share price return of 1.53% and a year to date share price return of 4.30%.
